reviews.review_msg: She is so sweet! I loved being about to take a class with her. My class was online so it wasn't required to attend lectures, although she did include some test material based on what was only talked about in the lecture (if the time doesn't work for you, she does record them). Understand the content, as exams are difficult and hard to study for.

she is SOOOO awesome. we have a website specifically for asking questions and she would never leave one question to the next day. her answers are greatly helpful and she is patient with all kinds of questions. class is amazing we all love it. she is an elegant lady and a charming prof. one of the best profs ive ever met.
